notes: The paper measured six floral traits and cupular-bract height independently, but published focal analyses used proportional exsertion, a composite. In seven of 12 seed-production populations the same labelled plants supplied morphology/pollen and later capsule data; five populations lost labels. Public supplement has only population summaries. With original individual rows, reanalyse the seven linked populations using predeclared A/B coordinates rather than exsertion; retain M2 unless and until those rows are received.
